name: python3-wtforms
title: python3-wtforms
summary: Flexible forms validation and rendering library for Python 3
description:
Flexible forms validation and rendering library for Python 3
WTForms is a flexible forms validation and rendering library for Python web
development. It can work with whatever web framework and template engine
you choose. It supports data validation, CSRF protection,
internationalization (I18N), and more. There are various community libraries
that provide closer integration with popular frameworks.
.
This package contains the module for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-wtforms because Flexible forms validation and rendering library for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-wtforms as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-wtforms with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-wtforms --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
